title: PreviewResult
description: Machine-readable output of `bin/preview.sh --json`. Combines the post-skip ActionPlan, a derived summary, the canonical plan SHA-256 (used for bootstrap.sh's --plan-sha256 binding), and the list of paths that --skip removed from the original plan. Replaces the legacy stderr-rendered summary for tooling consumers.

actions.description: Per-action histogram. Keys are the four ActionPlan action enums; values are non-negative counts.

total_bytes.description: Sum of `writes[].bytes` (entries without bytes contribute 0). Lets consumers render `Will write ~12 KB across 5 files` without re-parsing the plan.

plan_sha256.description: Hex SHA-256 of the canonicalised post-skip plan (jq -Sc). Empty string when neither shasum nor sha256sum is on PATH; in that case the integrity binding is disabled and bootstrap will refuse without --plan-sha256.

skips_applied.description: Paths the caller passed via --skip and that matched a write in the original plan. Order preserved as given on the command line.
